title: Process Checkout
description: Request body for attempting payment on an existing checkout. The required companion fields depend on the selected `payment_type`, for example card details, saved-card data, or payer information required by a specific payment method.

payment_type.description: Payment method used for this processing attempt. It determines which additional request fields are required.

installments.description: Number of installments for deferred payments. Available only to merchant users in Brazil.

google_pay.description: Raw `PaymentData` object received from Google Pay. Send the Google Pay response payload as-is.

apple_pay.description: Raw payment token object received from Apple Pay. Send the Apple Pay response payload as-is.

token.description: Saved-card token to use instead of raw card details when processing with a previously stored payment instrument.

customer_id.description: Customer identifier associated with the saved payment instrument. Required when `token` is provided.
